title: Temptation Harbor
writer: Rodney Ackland, Fritz Gottfurcht, Georges Simenon
actors: Robert Newton, Simone Simon, William Hartnell
plot: A signalman on a quay sees a fight between two men. One of the men is deliberately pushed into the water and the signalman cannot save him, but decides to keep his suitcase which he later finds is full of banknotes with a value of...
